requestedOutcome: Monitor each provider channel with one highest-priority representative model, allow administrator override, test, ship, and verify production.
goal: Monitor each provider channel with one highest-priority representative model, allow administrator override, test, ship, and verify production.
successEvidence: Focused and compatibility tests pass; channel-first browser QA passes; production representative probe succeeds without routing changes.
stopCondition: Done only after merged deployment and production verification; otherwise report blocked, needs-verification, or scope-exceeded.
nonGoals: No automatic route mutation from probe results.
scope: Channel monitor selection, probe execution, admin selection UI/API, reliability semantics, compatibility retirement, tests, docs, and deployment QA.
riskHints: Wrong ownership could alter routing semantics or multiply probe traffic.
